title: Earlier this week, we launched Runway Characters which represents a new type of real-time interaction with AI. These kinds of immersive simulated experiences are going to reshape the way we experience and engage with the internet. Building a technology this powerful means grappling with how it might be misused. Learn more at the link below about how we're building responsibly towards this new internet.
